title: Minecraft Adventure Master
description: A Modpack that changes the adventure part of Minecraft!
body:
### WARNING: PLAY ON THE THIRD PERSON MODE



This is The Ultimate Adventure Mod Pack.



Infinium Studios After A Year Has Created The Ultimate Adventure Experience From Minecraft Mods

And We have used Instead Of Sodium Vulkan That from the tests has presented better performance than sodium
![Wildfire Staff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf8cd93817460518210fab7afe3c545f6e290ebf.png)
With This Modpack You can Find New Ores On The Caves New Structures New Weapons Magic And Mobs![Mage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccc2039b653c48538b916ea8065404afb9869581.png)

Enjoy The Modpack And Remember Explore All Of It
You Will Like

![Wildfire Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/335f34d089bc01a3f68ba039ef8739f24940f917.png)![Company Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7113bdbb45d1c0ae5e061257419cb0702d81eabc.png)
